LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JEFF RICHARDS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT MET THEIR BURDEN OF ESTABLISHING THAT THERE IS NO STATUTORY BASIS FOR VENUE IN SAN FRANCISCO. (FONTAINE V. SUP. CT. (2009) 175 CAL.APP.4TH 830, 836.) THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES BREACH OF THREE SPECIFIC CONTRACTS. (COMPLAINT, EXHIBITS A - C.) DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT PROVIDED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO ESTABLISH THAT THESE SPECIFIC CONTRACTS WERE NOT ENTERED INTO IN SAN FRANCISCO. THE DECLARATION OF JEFF RICHARDS STATES AT 5 THAT HE FAXED DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFF, BUT DOES NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE FAXED DOCUMENTS WERE THE SPECIFIC CONTRACTS FORMING THE BASIS OF THE COMPLAINT. THUS, VENUE IS PROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO UNDER CCP 395(A). ONE ORDER FOR THIS MOTION AND JOINDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SCHWARTZ'S MOTION FOR JOINDER IN DEFENDANT RICHARDS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT MET THEIR BURDEN OF ESTABLISHING THAT THERE IS NO STATUTORY BASIS FOR VENUE IN SAN FRANCISCO. (FONTAINE V. SUP. CT. (2009) 175 CAL.APP.4TH 830, 836.) THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES BREACH OF THREE SPECIFIC CONTRACTS. (COMPLAINT, EXHIBITS A - C.) DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT PROVIDED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO ESTABLISH THAT THESE SPECIFIC CONTRACTS WERE NOT ENTERED INTO IN SAN FRANCISCO. THE DECLARATION OF JEFF RICHARDS STATES AT 5 THAT HE FAXED DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFF, BUT DOES NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE FAXED DOCUMENTS WERE THE SPECIFIC CONTRACTS FORMING THE BASIS OF THE COMPLAINT. THUS, VENUE IS PROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO UNDER CCP 395(A). ONE ORDER FOR THIS MOTION AND JOINDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing Re Pltf'S Req. For Entry Of Default Judgment Against American Solar Network Llc
Off Calendar Apr-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Amanda L. Morgan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ONE BLOCK OFF THE GRID, INC.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AMERICAN SOLAR NETWORK, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $196,275.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $236,503.00
Costs: $11,210.20
Total Judgment in the amount of $443,988.20
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Joinder In Deft Jeff Richards Mtn For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant DAMIAN SCHWARTZ'S Motion For Joinder In Defendant Jeff Richards' Motion For Change Of Venue

Defendant Schwartz's motion for joinder in Defendant Richards' motion for change of venue is Denied. Defendants have not met their burden of establishing that there is no statutory basis for venue in San Francisco. (Fontaine v. Sup. Ct. (2009) 175 Cal.App.4th 830, 836.) The complaint alleges breach of three specific contracts. (Complaint, Exhibits A - C.) Defendants have not provided sufficient evidence to establish that these specific contracts were not entered into in San Francisco. The Declaration of Jeff Richards states at 5 that he faxed documents to Plaintiff, but does not establish that the faxed documents were the specific contracts forming the basis of the Complaint. Thus, venue is proper in San Francisco under CCP 395(a). one order for this motion and joinder signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
